    Method
    Description

    Gets the shadow effect applied to the menu items.

    Method
    Description
    MenuButton

    Method
    Description

    ContentView.getShadow()

    Method
    Description
    final ContentView
    ContentView.setShadow(AbstractShadow shadow)

  • Uses of AbstractShadow in microui.core.effect

    Subclasses of AbstractShadow in microui.core.effect
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PlainShadow
    A simple shadow effect that creates a solid or gradient outline around a ContentView.
    class 
    ReactiveShadow
    A reactive shadow effect that dynamically adjusts its intensity based on mouse position.
    Methods in microui.core.effect that return AbstractShadow
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractShadow
    AbstractShadow.setColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the color of this shadow.
    AbstractShadow
    AbstractShadow.setTarget(ContentView target)
    Sets the target ContentView for this shadow.
    AbstractShadow
    PlainShadow.setWeight(int weight)
    Sets uniform shadow weight for all sides.
    AbstractShadow
    PlainShadow.setWeight(int weightHorizontal, int weightVertical)
    Sets shadow weight for horizontal and vertical sides separately.
    AbstractShadow
    PlainShadow.setWeight(int left, int top, int right, int bottom)
    Sets individual shadow weights for each side.
    AbstractShadow
    PlainShadow.setWeightBottom(int weightBottom)
    Sets the bottom shadow weight.
    AbstractShadow
    PlainShadow.setWeightLeft(int weightLeft)
    Sets the left shadow weight.
    AbstractShadow
    PlainShadow.setWeightRight(int weightRight)
    Sets the right shadow weight.
    AbstractShadow
    PlainShadow.setWeightTop(int weightTop)
    Sets the top shadow weight.
